{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321125406AB16BE394D9FC54DACA2"}"},"total":15},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7189542320696771366","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"背景贴合历史，而且人物背景叙述的很详细"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1673945898,"group_id":"7170138006286765067","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+TxCWzZ6LpTGoJi93VXxQVlmL/4sDWLre6ZznzvzHX8","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/68fcb005ad284334a57192eec74706ae~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776619775&x-signature=9WemGL1mtwUZzit2U%2BMx%2BBtKppM%3D","user_id":"3057093659606765","user_name":"我爱糖醋排骨啦啦啦"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3057093659606765","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7170138006286765067","book_info":{"abstract":"被公司裁员的高兵，被逼无奈做了一名跑龙套演员，谁知在片场由于过度劳累而睡着了。睡醒之后竟然发现自己穿越到了清朝，而此时他的人设是康熙的第四子胤禎，正值九子夺嫡的关键时期，他会做出怎样的行动，当上皇帝的他又会如何创造属于他的天下呢？
他智斗"八爷党"，君临天下。
他平复叛乱，智斗群臣。
他不畏危险，和文官集团相抗争。
他宠妻狂魔，留下一段佳话。
他微服私访，为民做主。
他力争改革，在艰难中前行。
他带兵出征，开辟疆土，创造出了一个伟大的帝国。
他发展科技，征服全球。
让我们开启属于一个他的伟大时代吧！
前期讲述我如何登上皇位，后期才是好戏的开始。
各位书友多多支持，谢谢大家","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o588f1d9ea80da9b907ecdd4c9cf57d5b~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"一只会哭泣的猫","author_id":"","book_id":"7170138006286765067","book_name":"什么？我穿越到清朝了！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#200808","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":498,"name":"皇帝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=498&name=皇帝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":503,"name":"清朝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=503&name=清朝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7170342051681141262","read_count":"37","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"103106"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"62","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,皇帝,清朝","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o588f1d9ea80da9b907ecdd4c9cf57d5b~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779252846&x-signature=2HKfKaNFK81ML58xxcd288OL4kw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"215983297661464","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.72709e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321125406AB16BE394D9FC54DACA2"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读38分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":579,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":2306,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":1444},"user_action":{"author":
